channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Republicans ask Supreme Court to block pro-Democrat rewrite of N.Y. congressional map
item.description: New York Republicans rushed to the Supreme Court Friday to ask the justices to block a last-minute attempt to redraw a GOP-held congressional district...

item.title: Judge rules ICE can't make warrantless arrests at some churches
item.description: A federal judge said Friday that ICE's policy of allowing arrests at churches tramples on religious rights, and he issued an order blocking arrests un...

item.title: Mamdami Demands U.S. Immigration Policy Start Obeying Islam
item.description: Mamdani invoked Islamic doctrine to define civic obligation and delegitimize lawful, constitutional authority.

item.title: The Nixon Library Is Wrong About Nixon And The Deep State
item.description: The new revelation about Nixon 'bears directly on allegations by President Trump and his supporters about the existence of what was once called the pe...

item.title: Virginia High Court Greenlights Democrat Effort To Give Millions Of Republicans A Single Seat In Congress
item.description: The Virginia Supreme Court handed Democrats a massive win Friday, allowing them to move forward with a redistricting referendum that would gerrymander...

item.title: Here Are 10 Great Justice Scalia Quotes To Mark A Decade Since His Passing
item.description: Here are some of Justice Scalia's best moments in remembrance of the 10-year anniversary of his passing.

item.title: AI and Our Collapsing Creative Horizons
item.description: The real danger AI poses is to original thought itself.

item.title: Congress Has Always Held the Power over Tariffs
item.description: The House has finally rebuked President Trump over his unilateral trade war.

item.title: AOC at Munich Security Conference accuses Trump of authoritarianism that puts the world at risk
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez trod onto the international stage Friday at the Munich Security Conference, where she condemned America's president as a...

item.title: Turns Out The Irishman Detained By ICE Was Facing Drug Charges Back Home
item.description: The arrest of Irishman Seamus Culleton fueled a false media narrative that ICE is grabbing law-abiding people who have done nothing wrong.

item.title: Biden administration paid millions in a sweetheart deal to care for migrant children
item.description: The Biden administration awarded a bloated half-billion-dollar contract to take care of migrant children to a politically connected nonprofit that had...

item.title: The Folly of Switzerland’s Proposed Population Cap
item.description: Swiss voters are being asked to decide on a referendum to limit the country’s population to 10 million people.

item.title: Virginia Supreme Court OKs redistricting special election before midterms
item.description: Virginia's Supreme Court greenlit a redistricting referendum for spring, handing Democrats a small win in the nationwide partisan fight to redraw cong...

item.title: Eileen Gu’s Terrible Choice
item.description: Gu skis for China, a choice that is a little like deciding to represent a fascist country during the 1930s.

item.title: The Week: The Nancy Guthrie Disappearance
item.description: Plus: Trump rolls back climate regulations.
